_comment: Campaign-state verbs over StrategyState. Trivial passthroughs only; the receiver expression resolves the singleton so each verb takes the method's own parameters. Bespoke campaign verbs (the conversation-var read, which takes a span) live in Strategy/Campaign.cs.

verbs.name: ResourceRaw
verbs.summary: Read a campaign resource/variable's raw stored value, before the game's effects are applied.

verbs.name: IsIronman
verbs.summary: Whether the campaign is an ironman run.

verbs.name: Progress
verbs.summary: A campaign-progress measure for the given progress type.

verbs.name: SetConversationVar
verbs.summary: Set a conversation variable by name.
